rulings.Case Title: STEVEN F GREENWALD et al VS. STEVEN A MINISINI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Verifications To Written Discovery And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday September 11, 2015, line 1. Defendant's Motion to Compel Verifications Continued to September 23, 2015 to be heard in Department 301 at 9:00 a.m. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KEYHAN MOHANNA VS. COUNTRYWIDE BANK, A DIVISION OF TREASURY BANK,N.A. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday September 11, 2015, line 2. Real Party in Interest Ventures Trust's Demurrer to First Amended Complaint SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to (1) add Venture Trust as a named Defendant; (2) to allege facts showing that Plaintiff has standing, i.e. prejudice; (3) as to the quiet title cause of action to allege adverse claims; (4) as to the cancellation of instrument cause of action to allege injury; and (5) as to the declaratory relief cause of action to allege a justiciable controversy. Finally, Plaintiff must retain counsel to represent the Trust or allege facts re: Ziegler v. Nickel (1998) 64 Cal.App.4th 545. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KEYHAN MOHANNA VS. COUNTRYWIDE BANK, A DIVISION OF TREASURY BANK,N.A. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday September 11, 2015, line 2. Defendant Bank of America's Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings GRANTED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to (1) to allege facts showing that Plaintiff has standing, i.e. prejudice; (2) as to the quiet title cause of action to allege adverse claims; (3) as to the cancellation of instrument cause of action to allege injury; and (4) as to the declaratory relief cause of action to allege a justiciable controversy. Finally, Plaintiff must retain counsel to represent the Trust or allege facts re: Ziegler v. Nickel (1998) 64 Cal.App.4th 545. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LUC P. DESCHAUMES VS. NEDDY BACHO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday September 11, 2015, line 7. Defendant's Demurrer to Complaint OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain regarding the ownership of the property and the plaintiffs suing in their capacity as trustees. = (501/REQ)
